name: The Back Nine Golf | Evansville, IN

No specific details about technology, pricing, or amenities are available from the public-facing pages. Further inquiry would be required to determine its full capabilities and offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Suitable for both practice and social play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue offers its own full bar and kitchen services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes between 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and has accommodations for junior players, making it a suitable environment for kids.
